Women, Infant & Children (WIC)
California WIC is open!
Keep using your WIC benefits.
Attend your WIC appointments.
Stay in contact with your local WIC office.
WIC and CalFresh are separate programs. Each program is funded and managed separately. CalFresh benefits delays do not affect WIC benefits or services. Both programs support food access for families.
Stay Informed! Check the status of WIC services through the MyFamily website or the California WIC App.
#CaliforniaWIC #WIC #governmentshutdown
Siskiyou County Women, Infants, and Children (WIC) is a federally funded program that provides healthy food benefits, nutrition education, breastfeeding support and family resources at no cost.
We proudly serve more than 900 women and children in Northern California.
WIC services include:
Practical nutrition information and everyday healthy living tips for you and your family.
Nutrition experts who specialize in nutrition for mothers and their children.
Support and information about breastfeeding your baby, including access to breastfeeding experts.
Help in finding health care and other valuable community services.
Benefits to buy healthy foods - such as fruits and vegetables, whole grains, milk, eggs, bread, cereal, juice, peanut butter, soy milk, tofu and more!
WIC can refer you to other helpful services.
Learn more in the guide
Ask WIC for Referrals
:
English [PDF
] |
Spanish [PDF]
You may qualify for WIC if you:
Are pregnant, breastfeeding, just had a baby (or recent pregnancy loss); or
Have a child or care for a child under age 5; and
Have low-to-medium income or receive Medi-Cal, CalWORKs (TANF), or CalFresh (SNAP) benefits; and
Live in California or are a Migrant Farm Worker.
Income Guidelines [PDF]
Find out if you qualify:
Use the
WIC eligibility assessment tool
to see if you qualify.
Contact us to schedule an appointment at one of the SCPH WIC locations:
Main Office Phone:  530-841-2170
WIC Cell Phone:  530-598-5826
siskiyouwic
@co.siskiyou.ca.us
FAX:  530-841-0424
More Food choices are coming to WIC! Starting in mid-April, WIC is adding new foods to give your family more options, more flavors and more flexibility at the store.
You will see new choices like:
More whole grains
New yogurt flavors
Canned fish
Fresh herbs
These updates make it easier to choose foods that fit your family's culture, tastes and needs.
See your new choices ay
MyFamily.WIC.ca.gov
#NewWICFoods #WIC #CaliforniaWIC
